name: Veyra Emberveil
sd_appearance: a willowy figure of 6'2" genasi stature, ash-gray skin etched with molten bronze veins that pulse like smoldering embers, smoke-colored hair braided with charred bone shards, eyes smoldering with amber light behind cracked goggles, clad in a soot-stained leather apron over rusted scale mail, warhammer with a cracked obsidian head clutched in one hand and a crossbow slung across the back, the air around her thick with the acrid scent of burnt metal and the faint hum of arcane sigils etched into her weathered leather gloves.
faction_visual: eclectic mix, deliberately no faction marks, one defining personal item
style_note: worn leather and chainmail, equipment that tells a story of past contracts
